hidden_state.wab_instruction: Create email filters: (1) route billing emails from the billing domain to the 'Billing' label, (2) route payroll keyword emails to the 'Payroll' label, and (3) forward emails from the executive to their assistant. Do not modify or delete the existing newsletter filter.
